description_long: This is a high-performance Audi coupe race car, featuring a low-slung, aerodynamic body with a prominent rear wing for downforce. The exterior is finished in a striking combination of red, white, and black, adorned with racing decals, sponsor logos, and the number 32. The car has a sleek, contoured roofline and wide fenders, emphasizing its aggressive stance and racing pedigree. Large, multi-spoke wheels and low-profile tires are visible, along with detailed side mirrors and a vented hood. The front grille bears the Audi logo, and the rear is equipped with a diffuser and dual exhausts. The windows are tinted, and the overall design is optimized for speed and performance on urban or track environments.
description: A red, white, and black Audi race coupe with a large rear wing, racing decals, and an aerodynamic, aggressive design. Features include wide fenders, low-profile tires, and prominent sponsor logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full racing livery, number 32, sponsor logos, and the large rear wing.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the Audi Sport branding on the wing, taillights, rear diffuser, and dual exhausts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar livery, visible door, and detailed wheel design.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the Audi grille, headlights, hood vents, and racing number on the hood.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
